untilDawn2ReleaseDateAndPlatforms.title: Until Dawn 2 Release Date and Platforms
untilDawn2ReleaseDateAndPlatforms.intro: Until Dawn 2 is officially announced for PlayStation 5 and planned for 2027. This section keeps the key store, platform, and launch details in one place.

items.label: Release Window
items.note: Until Dawn 2 is planned to release in 2027.

items.label: Platform
items.note: The game is currently announced for PS5.

items.label: Publisher
items.note: Sony Interactive Entertainment is listed as publisher.

items.label: Store Status
items.note: The PlayStation Store lists Until Dawn 2 as announced.

items.label: Wishlist

items.label: Genre
items.note: The PlayStation Store categorizes Until Dawn 2 under Adventure.

items.label: Controller Features

untilDawn2TrailerAndAnnouncement.title: Until Dawn 2 Trailer and Announcement
untilDawn2TrailerAndAnnouncement.intro: Until Dawn 2 was revealed during PlayStation State of Play with an official trailer, a launch-window confirmation, and a first look at the new standalone cast and island setting.

items.title: Until Dawn 2 - Announce Trailer | PS5 Games
items.description: The reveal trailer introduces the Dead True crew, the tropical island, and the sequel’s choice-driven horror tone.

items.title: State of Play June 2026 Announcement
items.description: PlayStation publicly announced Until Dawn 2 as a 2027 PS5 sequel developed by Firesprite.

items.title: Until Dawn 2 Story Reveal Article
items.description: The reveal article explains the story setup, the new ghost-hunter crew, Butterfly Effect mechanics, and Dr Hill’s return.

untilDawn2StoryAndSetting.title: Until Dawn 2 Story and Setting
untilDawn2StoryAndSetting.intro: Until Dawn 2 is a standalone sequel with a new cast, a new destination, and a fresh supernatural crisis. The core setup revolves around a ghost-hunting crew whose search for viral fame turns into a fight to survive the night.

items.title: Standalone Sequel
items.description: Until Dawn 2 starts a new story instead of continuing the original playable cast directly.
items.detail: The sequel keeps the series identity of horror choices and survival pressure while shifting to a fresh group and location.

items.title: Dead True Crew
items.description: The main cast are the personalities behind Dead True, a paranormal channel chasing a breakout moment.
items.detail: Their staged scares stop feeling safe once the island begins answering them with real supernatural danger.

items.title: TV-Funded Episode
items.description: The crew signs a deal for their first major TV-backed investigation.
items.detail: That opportunity pushes them toward a location far more dangerous than anything they expected to film.

items.title: Remote Tropical Island
items.description: The new setting is an abandoned tropical island built on old legends and hidden trauma.
items.detail: The environment mixes bright daylight, isolation, and buried history in a way that sharply contrasts the original mountain setting.

items.title: Haunted Legend
items.description: The island is tied to a woman’s chilling story of demons and ghostly manifestations.
items.detail: As the crew investigates, the legend begins to manifest around them in increasingly violent ways.

items.title: Dr Hill Returns
items.description: Dr Hill appears again in Until Dawn 2, with Peter Stormare reprising the role.
items.detail: His presence links the sequel to one of the most recognizable psychological threads in the series.

untilDawn2GameplayAndButterflyEffect.title: Until Dawn 2 Gameplay and Butterfly Effect
untilDawn2GameplayAndButterflyEffect.intro: Until Dawn 2 keeps the series’ interactive horror formula. Dialogue choices, relationship shifts, panic decisions, and small character moments can all become major survival consequences later in the story.

items.title: Make Story Choices
items.description: Players choose how the cast reacts during arguments, discoveries, and horror set pieces.
items.player_impact: Those choices can redirect trust, danger, and who is exposed first when the island turns hostile.

items.title: Manage Crew Relationships
items.description: The emotional state of the Dead True crew matters throughout the narrative.
items.player_impact: Friendship, fear, betrayal, and pressure from fame can change which routes remain open.

items.title: Face Life-or-Death Pressure
items.description: Scenes are built around decisions made under stress rather than slow, detached planning.
items.player_impact: A snap choice can determine who escapes, who is stranded, and who becomes vulnerable later.

items.title: Trigger the Butterfly Effect
items.description: Small actions can carry forward into much bigger story consequences.
items.player_impact: The game’s branching structure rewards players who pay attention to both obvious decisions and subtle interactions.

items.title: Shape Who Survives Until Dawn
items.description: The central goal remains getting as many characters through the night alive as possible.
items.player_impact: Your version of Until Dawn 2 changes based on who survives, who fractures the group, and who uncovers the truth.

untilDawn2CharactersAndCast.title: Until Dawn 2 Characters and Cast
untilDawn2CharactersAndCast.intro: Until Dawn 2 introduces a brand-new survivor group while also bringing Dr Hill back into the series. The confirmed cast direction centers on the Dead True crew and the haunted island legend surrounding them.

items.name: Dead True Ghost Hunter Crew
items.description: The new playable ensemble is the Dead True crew, a team of ghost hunters whose search for a career-defining episode turns into real horror.
key_points: Brand-new cast for a standalone sequel
Paranormal personalities chasing a breakout hit
Relationships inside the crew shape branching scenes
Group survival depends on player decisions

items.name: Dr Hill
items.description: Dr Hill returns in Until Dawn 2, with Peter Stormare reprising the role and reconnecting the sequel to the series’ psychological identity.
key_points: Seen in the official reveal material
Connects the sequel to the broader Until Dawn tone
Further story context is expected before launch

items.name: Remote Island Legend
items.description: The island’s supernatural legend functions almost like its own character, shaping the cast’s fear, decisions, and the threats they face.
key_points: Centuries-old secrets hidden beneath the surface
The legend becomes active as the story escalates

untilDawn2BeginnerGuide.title: Until Dawn 2 Beginner Guide
untilDawn2BeginnerGuide.intro: New players should approach Until Dawn 2 as a survival drama where every conversation, clue, and tense decision can matter. The safest first run comes from slowing down, reading relationships carefully, and treating every scare as part of a longer route.

items.title: Treat every choice as meaningful
items.description: Even casual dialogue or small acts of trust can matter later in a branching horror game.
items.player_tip: Pause for a second before big responses and think about safety, trust, and long-term fallout.

items.title: Watch the group dynamic
items.description: Until Dawn 2 gives weight to how the Dead True crew feels about each other.
items.player_tip: Avoid creating unnecessary fractures unless you are deliberately testing a darker route.

items.title: Explore before pushing ahead
items.description: Story context often becomes clearer if you inspect rooms, side paths, and environmental clues first.
items.player_tip: A slower pace usually gives you better context before the next dangerous choice.

items.title: Stay calm during panic scenes
items.description: Horror pressure works best when the game pushes you to react quickly under stress.
items.player_tip: Focus on the prompt before the scare. Missing a beat can change the route.

items.title: Replay with intent
items.description: Until Dawn 2 is designed for multiple outcomes, relationship states, and survival combinations.
items.player_tip: Let your first playthrough be honest, then replay specific chapters to test alternate branches.

quick_tips: A smaller conversation choice can still create a larger payoff later in the night.
If a character feels isolated, watch for scenes where support or abandonment could matter.
Environmental clues can change how you interpret later story decisions.
A blind first run usually delivers the strongest tension before you start route testing.

untilDawn2ChoicesAndEndings.title: Until Dawn 2 Choices and Endings
untilDawn2ChoicesAndEndings.intro: Until Dawn 2 keeps the franchise focused on branching survival outcomes. Before launch, the safest way to think about the game is through its major choice categories: survival, trust, route changes, and replayable consequence chains.

items.title: How choices affect survival
items.summary: Track who lives, who falls behind, and who becomes exposed.
items.content: Until Dawn 2 builds tension by tying player decisions to immediate danger and delayed consequences. A decision can protect someone in the moment or quietly place them at risk later.

items.title: How relationships affect routes
items.summary: The crew dynamic can open or close story paths.
items.content: Trust, resentment, ambition, fear, and loyalty inside the Dead True team can reshape later scenes. Relationship management is part of survival, not just flavor text.

items.title: What the Butterfly Effect means
items.summary: Small moments can send the story in a very different direction.
items.content: A line of dialogue, a split-second reaction, or a personal choice made under pressure can echo forward into route changes, character deaths, or new discoveries.

items.title: How endings should be tracked
items.summary: Use survivor count, relationship state, and major reveals as the main categories.
items.content: A practical endings tracker for Until Dawn 2 should organize which characters survive, which relationships hold, which secrets are uncovered, and how the island conflict resolves.

items.title: Best first-playthrough approach
items.summary: Play naturally first, then replay with a route goal.
items.content: The cleanest way to experience Until Dawn 2 is to make instinctive choices on your first run. Replay chapters later if you want specific survival combinations or alternate emotional outcomes.

untilDawn2DeveloperAndSeriesBackground.title: Until Dawn 2 Developer and Series Background
untilDawn2DeveloperAndSeriesBackground.intro: Until Dawn 2 is developed by Firesprite Ltd. and published by Sony Interactive Entertainment for PlayStation 5. The sequel keeps the franchise’s cinematic horror identity while moving to a new cast, new setting, and new central mystery.

items.title: Until Dawn launches on PlayStation 4
items.description: The original game established the franchise with cinematic horror, branching character fate, and the idea that every player could create a different night of survival.

items.title: Until Dawn returns for PS5 and PC
items.description: The modern release refreshed the original story for newer hardware and helped reintroduce the series to a wider audience before the sequel announcement.

items.title: Until Dawn 2 is announced
items.description: Sony Interactive Entertainment and Firesprite revealed Until Dawn 2 during State of Play, confirming a standalone PS5 sequel with a new cast and the return of Dr Hill.

items.title: Until Dawn 2 is planned for PS5
items.description: The official PlayStation pages list Until Dawn 2 for PlayStation 5 with a 2027 release window and active wishlisting.

faq.title: Until Dawn 2
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to the most common Until Dawn 2 release, platform, and story questions

questions.question: Is Until Dawn 2 a direct sequel to the original Until Dawn cast?
questions.answer: Until Dawn 2 is presented as a standalone sequel with a new playable cast, a new island setting, and a fresh supernatural crisis.

questions.question: What platform is Until Dawn 2 announced for?
questions.answer: Until Dawn 2 is officially announced for PlayStation 5.

questions.question: When is Until Dawn 2 releasing?
questions.answer: Until Dawn 2 is currently planned for release in 2027.

questions.question: Does Until Dawn 2 keep the Butterfly Effect system?
questions.answer: Yes. Until Dawn 2 keeps the choice-and-consequence structure, including relationship-based branches and survival outcomes shaped by player decisions.

questions.question: Who is developing Until Dawn 2?
questions.answer: Until Dawn 2 is being developed by Firesprite Ltd. and published by Sony Interactive Entertainment.

questions.question: Can I wishlist Until Dawn 2 now?
questions.answer: Yes. Until Dawn 2 can already be added to a PlayStation Store wishlist.
